pois.name: Punta del Este Cruise Terminal
pois.notes: Main commercial port near the peninsula tip where cruise ships dock.

pois.name: Playa Brava
pois.notes: Ocean-side beach with larger waves and home to the iconic La Mano sculpture.

pois.name: Playa Mansa
pois.notes: Bay-side beach with calmer waters, well suited to families and swimming.

pois.name: Casapueblo
pois.notes: Whitewashed sculpture-house-museum by Carlos Páez Vilaró on the cliffs of Punta Ballena.

pois.name: La Mano (The Hand)
pois.notes: Iconic sculpture of five fingers emerging from sand on Playa Brava, created by Mario Irarrázabal in 1982.

pois.name: Isla de Lobos
pois.notes: Island home to the largest South American sea lion colony. Boat tours available.

pois.name: Punta Ballena
pois.notes: Elevated headland with panoramic views and the location of Casapueblo.

pois.name: Isla Gorriti
pois.notes: Small island in the bay with beaches and ruins. Boat tours from the port.

pois.name: Plaza Artigas
pois.notes: Central square hosting an artisan craft market during summer season.

pois.name: Faro de Punta del Este
pois.notes: Historic lighthouse near the peninsula tip, built in 1860.
